title: Cxties Vanilla+
description: A Cxties modpack that makes Minecraft feel the way it should.
body:
# Cxties Vanilla+

![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/009b5880c050ed1f296a0d7464d0d66d89cf6aba_0.webp)

Everyone can agree that Minecraft gets a little dull at times. The purpose with Cxties Vanilla+ is to keep the feeling of vanilla Minecraft, but also provide a more refreshing experience.

Explore a world with the help of [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/datapack/terralith) and [Tectonic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic), who will provide you with better terrain generation, and there are even more structures to raid from the mod [Dungeons and Taverns](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dungeons-and-taverns).

Find yourself enjoying the environment, the world you are in does now feel more alive because of sound improvements from [AmbientSounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambientsounds), [Auditory Continued](https://modrinth.com/mod/auditory-continued) and many more.

# Multiplayer
The modpack originates from an SMP where the vanilla feeling was a priority. The modpack includes a proximity voice mod by [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat), but also [AudioPlayer](https://modrinth.com/mod/audioplayer) which allows you to play your own music by sourcing youtube links into any Minecraft disc. The pack so happen to be created by Femboys, so there are plushies and Blåhajar to be shared with your friends.

# Extras
For an even better experience, it is recommended to use the resource and shader packs listed down below;
- [Recolourful Containers DARK](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/recolourful-containers-gui-hud-dark)
- [Enchant Icons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enchant-icons-countxd)
- [Overlay's](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/overlays)
- [Simple Grass Flowers](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/simple-grass-flowers)
- [Complementary Shaders - Unbound](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/simple-grass-flowers)
